summary: Ch22 comprehensive copy-edit complete. 10 findings (0 critical, 3 major, 1 moderate, 6 minor). Three major findings: (1) Systematic British English spelling throughout the chapter (11 instances: re-stabilisation, coloured, realised, fibres, humour, favouring, recognised, colour, catalogued ×3) where chs1-21 use American English; (2) 'Serath Dún' (acute ú) should be 'Serath Dûn' (circumflex û) per geography.json — 3 instances, also present in ch21; (3) Conclave response references 'The Seventh Seat' for Thalen Reyvas, continuing pre-existing DISC-001 (politics.json assigns him Sixth Seat). One moderate: 'divine corpse' contradicts magic-system.json which states the Sheltering One persists in a diminished conscious state (not dead). Six minor: missing article before 'divine corpse,' 'almost electric' anachronism, 'hedge-Shapers' vs established 'hedge-witches,' unspecified 'left' hand for frozen fingers, ambiguous pronoun 'its seal,' awkward intransitive 'released.' Magic system compliance verified — no violations. Bond mechanics consistent. All character names, place names, and timeline events verified. Dialogue formatting clean. Tense consistent (past throughout). No banned phrases. This supersedes the prior copy-edit report (2026-03-21T02:20:00Z, 6 findings) with expanded coverage.
invariantsChecked: INV-002 (Internal Consistency): PARTIAL PASS — naming/spelling issues, one factual concern; world rules and continuity otherwise solid
INV-011 (Continuity Tracking): PASS — all character positions, timeline, naming verified; one minor explicitness improvement
INV-017 (Prose Quality Floor): PASS — clean grammar, correct formatting, no banned phrases
INV-018 (No Anachronisms): MINOR CONCERN — one instance of 'electric'
INV-019 (Dialogue Naturalism): PASS — correct em-dash, speech tag, and dialogue formatting
INV-029 (Artifact Cross-References): PASS — all references match world-bible except known DISC-001
